clay_promotion_reason: Parameter table only; no analytic mass-gap theorem or Clay promotion is claimed.

k_G_conservative_rule.concrete_entries: For fixed entries, k_G is the listed integer adjoint dimension.
exclusions: SO(4) is excluded from the simple SO(N) family row because so(4) splits as su(2) + su(2).
k_G_conservative_rule.statement: Set k_G conservatively to dim(ad G), the real dimension of the compact simple Lie algebra.
k_G_conservative_rule.symbolic_families: For SU(N), SO(N), and Sp(N), k_G remains the exact symbolic adjoint-dimension formula over the stated parameter domain.
